name: Samsung
collaborationStyle: product launch, device review, campaign integration
notes: Reserved for large channels; typically goes through agency intermediaries

name: Intel
collaborationStyle: PC build integration, benchmark showcase, performance campaign
notes: Strong fit for PC building, hardware review, and gaming-adjacent tech creators

name: LG
collaborationStyle: product review, setup showcase, home tech integration
notes: Active in creator space for monitors, TVs, and home appliances; good fit for setup and home tech creators

name: Microsoft
collaborationStyle: software tutorial, Surface review, productivity integration, campaign
notes: Wide range of sponsorable products (Surface, Xbox, Office, Copilot); more creator-accessible than Apple

name: Apple
collaborationStyle: product launch, ecosystem integration, campaign-based storytelling
notes: Extremely selective; flagship collaborations only with top-tier tech and lifestyle channels

name: Google
collaborationStyle: Pixel/Android launch, Workspace/Drive integration, AI/Cloud campaigns
notes: Covers Pixel, Nest, Workspace and more; great for creators across devices, productivity, and cloud

name: NVIDIA
collaborationStyle: GPU launch content, AI/creator workflow integrations, gaming performance series
notes: Natural fit for PC building, gaming, and AI workstation creators

name: AMD
collaborationStyle: Ryzen/RADEON builds, workstation content, price/performance stories
notes: Used heavily in comparison builds; strong fit for enthusiast PC and workstation channels

name: ASUS / ROG
collaborationStyle: laptop/monitor/motherboard reviews, full rig showcases, gaming setups
notes: Covers ROG gaming line; strong sponsorship history with tech and PC/gaming channels

name: Dell XPS / Alienware
collaborationStyle: creator laptop content, workstation builds, gaming laptop reviews
notes: Good fit for creator laptops, dev environments, and gaming rigs on mid/large tech channels

name: Anker
collaborationStyle: product review, unboxing, setup/desk tour integration
notes: Extremely creator-friendly; one of the most accessible mid-tier tech sponsors; fast approvals

name: NordVPN
collaborationStyle: privacy story, mid-roll segment, evergreen integration
notes: One of the most prolific YouTube sponsors across all tech and non-tech niches; very easy integration

name: Squarespace
collaborationStyle: website showcase, portfolio story, mid-roll segment
notes: Universal fit for any tech creator with a personal brand or portfolio; perennial YouTube sponsor

name: Logitech
collaborationStyle: peripheral review, desk setup showcase, productivity integration
notes: Covers mice, keyboards, webcams, and streamgear; wide fit across tech, gaming, and productivity creators

name: Dashlane
collaborationStyle: cybersecurity story, password manager demo, mid-roll
notes: Password manager with active creator program; good alternative angle to NordVPN for privacy-focused content

name: Webflow
collaborationStyle: no-code tutorial, portfolio build, design workflow showcase
notes: Strong fit for web design, no-code, and developer-adjacent tech creators; high CPM due to B2B audience

name: Backblaze
collaborationStyle: backup horror stories, workflow integration, peace-of-mind segment
notes: Online backup brand; long history with tech, dev, and creator channels

name: Linode / Akamai
collaborationStyle: server setup tutorials, cloud dev environments, sponsored series

name: DigitalOcean

name: 1Password
